# Test help command outputs usage information

exec apx help
stdout 'API schemas across organizations'
stdout 'Usage:'
stdout 'Available Commands:'

# Test global flags in help
exec apx help
stdout 'Flags:'
stdout '--quiet'
stdout '--verbose'
stdout '--json'
stdout '--no-color'

# Test specific command help
exec apx help init
stdout 'Create a new schema module'
stdout 'Usage:'

# Test completion command exists (auto-generated by cobra)
exec apx completion bash
stdout 'bash completion'
